title: E2E Fixture
description: Synthetic curriculum used by Playwright e2e tests to exercise lesson completion, sidebar reactivity, and tall-block scroll-to-complete without depending on the smoke build's ever-changing fixture.

content.markdown: Hello. This is a short text block whose sentinel sits inside the viewport on first render, so it should fire `textcomplete` after the 1 s debounce.

# Tall block This lesson is long enough that the end-of-block sentinel sits below the fold on initial render.
 
The sentinel only intersects the viewport once `
` has been scrolled to the bottom — completion must NOT fire before that scroll, and it MUST fire within 2 s of reaching the bottom.

modules.title: Module Two
modules.description: Trailing module so the curriculum has at least three lessons total.

content.markdown: Trailing lesson body. Provides a destination for navigation tests.
